title: Clancy Brown
content:
{{Top|rwp}} {{Otheruses|Clancy|more=Brown}} {{Person |image=[[File:Clancy_Brown.jpg]] |name=Clancy Brown |birth=[[January 5]], [[1950s#1959|1959]]{{WebCite|url=https://www.upi.com/Top_News/2019/01/05/UPI-Almanac-for-Saturday-Jan-5-2019/9081546481545|text=UPI Almanac for Saturday, Jan. 5, 2019|date=2019-01-05|quote=actor Clancy Brown in 1959 (age 60)|archivedate=20190105134420}} |death= |listedpronouns= |nationality=[[Wikipedia:United States of America|American]] |occupation=*Voice actor *Actor |companies= |website= }} '''Clarence John Brown III''', known as '''Clancy Brown''', (born [[January 5]], [[1950s#1959|1959]]) is an [[Wikipedia:United States of America|American]] actor and voice actor. Brown began his acting career in the early 1980s with an appearance in [[Wikipedia:The Dukes of Hazzard|''The Dukes of Hazzard'']]. He is mostly recognizable for his role as the protagonist's friend in [[Wikipedia:The Adventures of Buckaroo Banzai Across the 8th Dimension|''The Adventures of Buckaroo Banzai Across the 8th Dimension'']] (1984), The Kurgan in [[Wikipedia:Highlander (film)|''Highlander'']] (1986), prison guard Byron Hadley in [[Wikipedia:The Shawshank Redemption|''The Shawshank Redemption'']] (1994), a drill instructor in [[Wikipedia:Starship Troopers (film)|''Starship Troopers'']] (1997) and the preacher Meacham in [[Wikipedia:Cowboys & Aliens|''Cowboys & Aliens'']] (2011). Brown is of Scottish ancestry. Having a deep and resonant voice, he also works as a voice actor for both animation and video games, including [[Wikipedia:Mortal Kombat (film)|''Mortal Kombat'']] (1995), [[Wikipedia:Gargoyles|''Gargoyles'']] (1995–1996), [[Wikipedia:SpongeBob SquarePants|''SpongeBob SquarePants'']] (1999–present) and [[Wikipedia:Avatar: The Last Airbender|''Avatar: The Last Airbender'']] (2005–2008; a show which featured heavy involvement from [[Dave Filoni]] and [[Giancarlo Volpe]]). He also voiced Lex Luthor in the DC Animated Universe's [[Wikipedia:Superman: The Animated Series|''Superman: The Animated Series'']] (1996–2000), [[Wikipedia:Justice League (TV series)|''Justice League'']] (2001–2004) and [[Wikipedia:Justice League Unlimited|''Justice League Unlimited'']] (2004–2006). ==Biography== Clancy Brown provided the voice of the [[Mandalorian]] [[bounty hunter]] [[Montross (bounty hunter)|Montross]] in ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'', the [[Nightbrothers|Nightbrother]] turned [[Sith Lord]] [[Savage Opress]] in [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|''The Clone Wars'']], and [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[Governor]] turned [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] member [[Ryder Azadi]] for ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]''. He reprised the role of Azadi in live-action in the ''[[Star Wars: Ahsoka]]'' television series. He also portrayed the [[Devaronian]] [[Burg]] in the [[Disney+]] live-action TV series ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian]]''. ==Works== ===Filmography=== {| {{Prettytable}} ! Year !! Title !! Series !!
